column2: Determine the Supplier is not Enrolled in the SCT Program
column3: Review the Supplier Transfer Enrollment List to confirm the supplier is not enrolled in the SCT Program

column2: Run WIMS Wizard to Generate the Replacement PO
column3: Run the WIMS wizard against an item on the original PO utilizing the following Wizard Path: Select Eligible Item Indicate if CT has received item: Select Yes or No as applicable Select Reason of Customer Contact: Notified of a delay/issue Select Issue Diagnosis: Incomplete Shipment Continue Select Resolution: Replace the item with a brand new one! Continue
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Supplier Needs a Replacement template and close the ticket under a Done resolution.
